companyInfo.title: Company Info and Contact
companyInfo.description: SF-Comics, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Horizon Media Corporation, is one of the world's most prominent character-based entertainment companies, built on a proven library of more than 5,000 characters featured in a variety of media over thirty years. SF-Comics utilizes its character franchises in entertainment, licensing and publishing. For more information visit sf-comics.com.

developmentTeam.name: Boris Zashliapin
developmentTeam.description: I am a serene presence driven by hidden, unseen energies. My everyday superpower is flexibility: whether I am centering divs with the magic of flexbox or doing mind-bending yoga stretches like the splits. Life is a game of chance, and just like Gambit, I’m here to bend reality, build and play it with style and grace.

developmentTeam.name: Denis Semenov
developmentTeam.description: I am an engineering genius encased in high-tech armor and powered by an unstoppable arc reactor. My everyday superpower is precision and automation: whether I am structuring flawless layouts with clean code or instantly solving complex technical bugs. Life is a continuous upgrade, and I am here to engineer reality.

developmentTeam.name: Dmitrii Prokhorov
developmentTeam.description: I am a living spark powered by pure speed. My everyday superpower is instant reaction: I optimize page load speeds faster than light and render UI in microseconds. Life moves fast, and I deploy bulletproof code in a flash.

developmentTeam.name: Dzmitry Mamaikin
developmentTeam.description: I am a mental guide unlocking hidden potential. My everyday superpower is knowledge architecture: I read junior devs' minds, spot logic bugs instantly, and build perfect career tracks. Life is evolution, and I am here to guide your growth.
